title: Tax exemption
doc_html:
§3023.7. Tax exemption

            All property and income of the board used exclusively for the purposes of this Chapter shall be exempt from all taxes and assessments.

            Acts 1978, No. 135, §2; Acts 2016, No. 314, §3(A).
doc_text:
§3023.7.  Tax exemption
All property and income of the board used exclusively for the purposes of this
Chapter shall be exempt from all taxes and assessments.
Acts 1978, No. 135, §2; Acts 2016, No. 314, §3(A).
